Who We Are

The Ultimate
Feel-Good Duo

N30N N0iZE are a high-energy party duo bringing the perfect blend of style, charisma, and non-stop party vibes to every event. With Michelle's powerful vocals leading the way and Glen's dynamic guitar and backing vocals driving the sound, they deliver a mix everyone loves.

From crowd-favourite hits and sing-along classics to the latest modern anthems, every set is crafted to keep the dance floor packed from the very first song to the very last call.

Based in Liverpool and available across the Northwest UK — perfect for weddings, parties, corporate events and live venues. Michelle & Glen guarantee a night full of music, energy, and memories that last a lifetime.

Check Availability
The Duo

Michelle & Glen

Lead Vocals
Michelle

Powerful, soulful, and magnetic — Michelle's voice commands every room. Her stage presence and vocal range turn familiar hits into unforgettable live moments.

Guitar & Backing Vocals
Glen

Glen's dynamic guitar work and backing vocals are the driving force behind the N30N N0iZE sound. His energy and musicianship elevate every performance.

Where You'll Find Us

Perfect For
Every Occasion

💍
Weddings

Create the perfect soundtrack for your big day — from romantic first dances to late-night floor-fillers that keep the whole room going.

🎉
Private Parties

Birthdays, anniversaries, milestone celebrations — we bring the energy that turns a good party into a legendary one.

🏢
Corporate Events

Impress your guests and create genuine buzz at your next company event, awards night, or client entertainment evening.

🎸
Live Venues

Bars, clubs, festivals — we thrive in live venues and know exactly how to read and work a crowd from the very first song.

What People Say

Don't Just Take Our Word For It

★★★★★

"N30N N0iZE absolutely made our wedding. The dance floor was packed from the first song to the last. Michelle's voice is incredible and Glen had everyone singing along. We've had so many guests ask for their details!"

Sarah & James T. Wedding Reception, Chester
★★★★★

"We hired N30N N0iZE for our company Christmas party and they were a massive hit. Professional from start to finish, great communication beforehand and an absolutely electric performance on the night. Would book again without hesitation."

Mark D. Corporate Event, Manchester
★★★★★

"Booked for my 40th birthday party and they smashed it. Every song was a banger, the energy never dropped and Michelle and Glen were so warm and fun with the crowd. Honestly the best live act I've seen at a private party."

Karen M. Private Party, Liverpool
★★★★★

"We've had a lot of acts at our venue but N30N N0iZE are something special. The crowd reaction was unreal — people were up dancing within minutes. Already rebooked them for three more dates this year."

Tom H. Venue Manager, Blackpool
